title: Accurate Search in Sorted Array with Inaccurate Return Handling

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.

editorial.title: Accurate Search in Sorted Array
editorial.intuition: Binary search is an efficient algorithm for finding an item from a sorted list of items. It works by repeatedly dividing in half the portion of the list that could contain the item, until you've narrowed the possible locations to just one.
editorial.optimalSolution: The optimal solution is a simple binary search implementation that handles duplicate numbers correctly.
